# `zone.getAuthorizationTokenInfo`

Returns the authenticated account address and token expiry from the current authorization token.

## Usage

:::code-group

```ts twoslash [example.ts]
// @twoslash-cache: {"v":2,"hash":"93918bbbf8713c0cf54d03b54053db03f3307cb69a154b05f59bccaf83c19dcb","data":""}
import { client } from './zones.config'

const info = await client.zone.getAuthorizationTokenInfo()

console.log('Account:', info.account)
console.log('Expires At:', info.expiresAt)
// @log: Account: 0x...
// @log: Expires At: 1717027200
```

```ts twoslash [zones.config.ts] filename="zones.config.ts"
// @twoslash-cache: {"v":2,"hash":"fb582a12c68355250c6c86cec7c09f8f28138bccd8bfded2353b1b48b8bb9b9d","data":""}
// [!include ~/snippets/tempo/zones.config.ts:setup]
```

:::

## Return Type

```ts
type ReturnType = {
  account: Address
  expiresAt: number
}
```
